title: Seasonal Reminders
subtitle: Stay ahead of maintenance for each season
springAcServiceDesc: Get your air conditioning serviced before the summer heat arrives
springGutterCleanDesc: Clear debris from winter to prevent water damage
springDeckInspectDesc: Check for rot, loose boards, and seal if needed
springSprinklerDesc: Start up your irrigation and check for broken heads
springPestDesc: Schedule a preventive pest inspection before warm weather
summerIrrigationDesc: Verify sprinkler coverage and adjust for summer watering needs
summerPestDesc: Apply preventive treatments to keep pests out during peak season
summerAcFilterDesc: Swap your air filter for optimal cooling efficiency
summerPoolDesc: Check chemical levels, clean filters, and inspect equipment
summerGarageDoorDesc: Grease tracks, rollers, and hinges to prevent wear
fallFurnaceDesc: Have your heating system inspected before winter
fallWeatherstripDesc: Seal gaps around doors and windows to save on heating
fallChimneyDesc: Get your chimney cleaned and inspected before fireplace season
fallGutterCleanDesc: Remove leaves and debris before winter freezing
fallSprinklerDesc: Blow out irrigation lines to prevent pipe damage from freezing
winterPipeDesc: Protect exposed pipes from freezing, especially in unheated areas
winterRoofIceDesc: Monitor for ice dams and ensure proper attic ventilation
winterHvacFilterDesc: Fresh filter keeps your furnace running efficiently in cold months
winterWaterHeaterDesc: Drain sediment to extend the life of your water heater
winterEmergencyKitDesc: Stock flashlights, batteries, and supplies for winter storms
